SpeedoIV-CE bundled artwork
============================

Bck.png  -- speedometer dial face
Pin.png  -- needle

Original artwork (c) retarded_chicken, 2009, distributed with the
original "SpeedoIV" mod on gtaiv-mods.com.

Only the textures from that release are reused here. None of the
original SpeedoIV code is included or relied upon; the rendering
logic in SpeedoIV-CE is an independent reimplementation that targets
GTA IV Complete Edition (1.2.0.43) + FusionFix/DXVK.

If you want to ship a different skin, drop a folder next to this one
(e.g. SpeedoIV/MySkin/) containing Bck.png and Pin.png and set
`SkinFolder = MySkin` in Config.ini.
